defs: Speaking or writing blasphemy; uttering or exhibiting anything impiously irreverent; profane; as, a blasphemous person; containing blasphemy; as, a blasphemous book; a blasphemous caricature.
quotes: Nor from the Holy One of Heaven Refrained his tongue blasphemous.
notes: ☞ Formerly this word was accented on the second syllable, as in the above example.
